description: Reference environment — Python API + React front end (two-process), preconfigured to import and launch. Clones coderflow-reference-apps and runs the python-react app.

repos.name: coderflow-reference-apps
repos.post_clone_action:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-react/api && pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-react/web && npm install

application_server.name: Python + React
application_server.start_command:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-react/api && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001 --reload &
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/python-react/web && npm run dev
